subject: docs: comprehensive documentation audit — add Sancio endpoints, fix stale references
body:
Documentation audit triggered by `docs` checklist. Found 10 issues across
8 files where docs had diverged from actual code.

Changes:
- API.md: added full Sancio endpoint reference (~25 endpoints were entirely
  undocumented), fixed CORS origins (removed stale devmade-ai.github.io,
  added glow-props/see-veo/sun-sea-o)
- README.md: updated "two systems" to three, added Sancio endpoints table
- USER_GUIDE.md: added Sancio section with core concepts and workflow,
  fixed field types (removed url/file/scale/multi_select, added
  checkbox_group/heading/hidden), added in/not_in operators
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: added 4 Sancio test suites to existing coverage
  section (validation 48, invite 8, verify-passphrase 6, projects 7)
- BACKEND_SPEC.md: fixed route paths (/api/invite → /api/sancio/invite),
  changed Resend → Nodemailer SMTP, removed RESEND_API_KEY, added
  sender_tone field to notes and proposals tables
- SESSION_NOTES.md: rewritten for current session
- HISTORY.md: added 2026-03-20 entries
- SPEC_API_NAMING_CONSISTENCY.md: marked as implemented

Tags: documentation, audit, sancio, api
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: api-naming-consistency
Semver: patch

title: comprehensive documentation audit — add Sancio endpoints, fix stale references
